action.proof_term:
intro N hN
  set A := 504 * N - 1 with hA
  set C := 360 * N - 1 with hC
  have heq : 5 * A - 7 * C = 2 := by rw [hA, hC]; omega
  have hgA : Nat.gcd A C ∣ A := Nat.gcd_dvd_left A C
  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := by
    have hsub := Nat.dvd_sub' hg5A hg7C
    rwa [heq] at hsub
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by
    rw [hA]
    intro hdvd
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd
    omega
  rcases (Nat.dvd_prime (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 2)).mp hg2 with h1 | h2
  · exact h1
  · exact absurd (h2 ▸ hgA) hAodd

  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7

  · exact absurd (h2 ▸ hgA) hAodd

intro N hN
  set A := 504 * N - 1 with hA
  set C := 360 * N - 1 with hC
  have heq : 5 * A - 7 * C = 2 := by rw [hA, hC]; omega
  have hle : 7 * C ≤ 5 * A := by omega
  have hgA : Nat.gcd A C ∣ A := Nat.gcd_dvd_left A C
  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := by
    have hsub := Nat.dvd_sub hle hg5A hg7C
    rwa [heq] at hsub
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by
    rw [hA]
    intro hdvd
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd
    omega
  rcases (Nat.dvd_prime (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 2)).mp hg2 with h1 | h2
  · exact h1
  · exact absurd (h2 ▸ hgA) hAodd

  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5

intro N hN
  set A := 504 * N - 1 with hA
  set C := 360 * N - 1 with hC
  have heq : 5 * A - 7 * C = 2 := by rw [hA, hC]; omega
  have hgA : Nat.gcd A C ∣ A := Nat.gcd_dvd_left A C
  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := by
    rw [← heq]
    exact Nat.dvd_sub hg5A hg7C
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by
    rw [hA]
    intro hdvd
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd
    omega
  rcases (Nat.dvd_prime (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 2)).mp hg2 with h1 | h2

intro N hN
  set A := 504 * N - 1 with hA
  set C := 360 * N - 1 with hC
  have heq : 5 * A - 7 * C = 2 := by rw [hA, hC]; omega
  have hgA : Nat.gcd A C ∣ A := Nat.gcd_dvd_left A C
  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := by
    rw [← heq]
    exact Nat.dvd_sub hg5A hg7C
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by
    rw [hA]
    intro hdvd
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd
    omega
  rcases (Nat.dvd_prime (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 2)).mp hg2 with h1 | h2
  · exact h1
  · exact absurd (h2 ▸ hgA) hAodd

intro N hN
  set A := 504 * N - 1 with hA
  set C := 360 * N - 1 with hC
  have heq2 : 5 * A = 7 * C + 2 := by rw [hA, hC]; omega
  have hgA : Nat.gcd A C ∣ A := Nat.gcd_dvd_left A C
  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := by
    rw [heq2] at hg5A
    exact (Nat.dvd_add_right hg7C).mp hg5A
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by
    rw [hA]
    intro hdvd
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd
    omega
  have hgor : Nat.gcd A C = 1 ∨ Nat.gcd A C = 2 := (Nat.dvd_prime (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 2)).mp hg2
  rcases hgor with h1 | h2
  · exact h1
  · exfalso
    apply hAodd
    rw [← h2]
    exact hgA

  set A := 504 * N - 1 with hA
  set C := 360 * N - 1 with hC
  have heq2 : 5 * A = 7 * C + 2 := by rw [hA, hC]; omega
  have hgA : Nat.gcd A C ∣ A := Nat.gcd_dvd_left A C
  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C

  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := by
    rw [heq2] at hg5A
    exact (Nat.dvd_add_right hg7C).mp hg5A
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by
    rw [hA]
    intro hdvd
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd
    omega

  · exact h1
  · exfalso
    apply hAodd
    rw [← h2]
    exact hgA

intro N hN
  set A := 504 * N - 1 with hA
  set C := 360 * N - 1 with hC
  have heq2 : 5 * A = 7 * C + 2 := by rw [hA, hC]; omega
  have hgA : Nat.gcd A C ∣ A := Nat.gcd_dvd_left A C
  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg5A' : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C + 2 := heq2 ▸ hg5A
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := (Nat.dvd_add_right hg7C).mp hg5A'
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by rw [hA]; intro hdvd; obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd; omega
  have hgor : Nat.gcd A C = 1 ∨ Nat.gcd A C = 2 := (Nat.dvd_prime (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 2)).mp hg2
  rcases hgor with h1 | h2
  · exact h1
  · exact absurd (h2 ▸ hgA) hAodd

intro N hN

  have hgC : Nat.gcd A C ∣ C := Nat.gcd_dvd_right A C
  have hg5A : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 5 * A := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgA 5
  have hg7C : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C := Dvd.dvd.mul_left hgC 7
  have hg5A' : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 7 * C + 2 := heq2 ▸ hg5A
  have hg2 : Nat.gcd A C ∣ 2 := (Nat.dvd_add_right hg7C).mp hg5A'
  have hAodd : ¬ (2:ℕ) ∣ A := by rw [hA]; intro hdvd; obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hdvd; omega
  have hgor : Nat.gcd A C = 1 ∨ Nat.gcd A C = 2 := (Nat.dvd_prime (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 2)).mp hg2
  rcases hgor with h1 | h2
  · exact h1
  · exact absurd (h2 ▸ hgA) hAodd

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
